untranslatable_reason: Signal requires commodity-specific indicators not available: inventory levels, days-to-cover metric, production schedule gaps, and storage cost index. These are domain-specific fundamental data inputs (not technical indicators) that cannot be proxied by standard OHLCV-derived indicators. Partial proxy attempted using price_pos_20 and hvol_20 but does not capture the core microstructure logic.
translation_notes: Original signal is fundamentally based on inventory/supply microstructure which requires custom data feeds. Attempted to approximate entry using price position percentile (price_pos_20 < 0.5 for depleted state) and elevated volatility (hvol_20 > 0.5). Exit on 5% return gain matches parameters. However, without actual inventory, days-to-cover, supply gap, and storage cost data, this cannot be properly translated to a technical rule.
